text: I feel a quiet curiosity here, standing just outside the glass room where a group of people are intently focused on a presentation. The modern, open design and the clarity of the glass evoke a sense of transparency—in both architecture and, perhaps, thought. There is an energy of learning and collaboration in the air, distant from the rush of the outside world. I am reminded of the barrier between observer and participant, and I wonder: is knowledge gained more deeply through observation or through direct engagement?
